meta_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve Scaling Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale your SaaS projects. Learn how to implement SEO for SaaS using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led freelancer checklist.
content.answer_block: To scale your SaaS, you must move from manual coding to automated, SEO-optimized architecture. By embedding semantic metadata, dynamic sitemaps, and performance-first structural patterns directly into your build pipeline using Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform your codebase into a high-ranking asset that attracts clients on autopilot.
content.intro:
You wake up to a inbox full of client requests, but your current codebase is a tangled mess of hard-coded slugs and static pages. You’re trading time for money, stuck in a cycle of manual updates where every new feature feels like a structural hazard. The ceiling on your income isn't your skill; it's your lack of an automated, scalable SEO foundation.

But what if your code did the marketing for you? By integrating SEO logic at the architectural level, you stop building apps and start building engines. This checklist is your blueprint for automating high-performance, search-optimized SaaS builds that impress clients and scale effortlessly.

steps.title: Automate Semantic Metadata Injection
steps.description: Ensure every route automatically generates dynamic OpenGraph and schema.org tags to boost indexability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable metadata wrapper that pulls dynamic OG tags and JSON-LD schema from the database for all SaaS routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement SEO metadata wrapper in layout.tsx'

steps.title: Generate Dynamic XML Sitemaps
steps.description: Stop manual sitemap updates. Create a background worker that triggers on new content creation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a server-side route that generates a dynamic sitemap.xml based on active project slugs in our database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'add dynamic sitemap generation route to api/sitemap.xml'

steps.title: Optimize Core Web Vitals
steps.description: Google ranks fast sites. Use automated image compression and lazy loading patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor all image components to use next/image with automatic lazy loading and WebP conversion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'optimize image rendering for performance'

steps.title: Implement Canonical URL Enforcement
steps.description: Prevent duplicate content penalties by ensuring every page has a self-referencing canonical tag.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a canonical URL generator that pulls the base domain from environment variables and appends the current path.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'inject canonical link tags into head'

steps.title: Automate Internal Linking
steps.description: Build an intelligent system that links related articles or features to reduce bounce rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a utility function that scans content for keywords and injects internal links to relevant landing pages.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement automated internal linking utility'

pro_tips: Always set your canonical URL to a relative path during staging to prevent index pollution during development.
Use JSON-LD for your pricing pages to win 'Rich Snippet' real estate in search results.
Force trailing slashes in your routing config to avoid double-indexing the same content.
Monitor your Google Search Console 'Crawl Errors' weekly to catch broken routes before clients do.
Keep your H1 tags unique per page; never reuse the site title as the H1 for individual feature pages.
content.next_steps: Once your SEO infrastructure is live, run a Lighthouse audit to confirm your performance scores are above 90, then deploy to your production environment.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to scale your projects and command higher rates. Stop building manually and start scaling your impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
